steps.title: Look for the narrator's fear
steps.content: The claim says the narrator was frightened of the sailor, so the quotation must show the narrator's emotional reaction. Nightmare imagery about the sailor haunting his dreams and appearing with diabolical expressions directly shows fear.

steps.title: Reject neutral descriptions
steps.content: Choice A describes the sailor's arrival. Choice B describes his quiet habits. Choice C describes his clothing and hat. Those details may be vivid, but they do not show the narrator feeling frightened. The answer is D.
